boundary_binding.action_boundary: May operations release a routine action when the dependency closure must match the requested object, scope, and release condition?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No exact match on release condition
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: Dependency matching uses the source record for the same source object, account, operating scope, release condition, and closure timestamp before the queued action per MATCH-MDV-006
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Exact match required on release condition per MATCH-MDV-006
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Timestamp matches but release condition RC-MDV-006 vs RC-MDV-006-S does not

final_answer: Source records show exact match on object, account, scope, and timestamp but release condition differs (RC-MDV-006 vs RC-MDV-006-S). MATCH-MDV-006 requires identical release condition for closure. Boundary remains open. Action may not proceed without exact match confirmation.
